title: Audio recording: call on Lebanese Sunnis to defect from the army
dateStatus: Needs review — both event date and publication date listed as 'Needs review' in candidate file; not reviewed in current verification pass
speakerNameMethodologicalNote: Contemporary public name at the time of this record: Abu Muhammad al-Jolani. The name Ahmad al-Sharaa is used here as a cross-period project identifier for organisational purposes and does not imply self-identification under that name at the date of this record.
evidenceSummary: An audio recording attributed to Abu Muhammad al-Jolani, leader of Jabhat al-Nusra, provisionally dated to 2014. The candidate file describes the content as a call directed at Lebanese Sunni members of the Lebanese Armed Forces to defect from the army. Both the event date and the publication date are listed as 'Needs review' in the candidate file. The distribution channel, primary audio source, and content have not been confirmed through primary source verification. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass (which covered S2015-005 only).
publicResearchNote: This audio recording is retained as a Phase 1 corpus candidate because it is an attributed statement directed at a Lebanese audience that differs in form and addressee from the Syrian-focused audio statements. Date (both event and publication), distribution channel, primary audio source, and content all require verification. No transcript has been located. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass.
